user.title: LG OLED TV Setup
user.description: Enter the IP address of your LG TV.

pairing.title: Pair with TV
pairing.description:
A pairing request will appear on your TV at {host}. Please accept it using your remote.

Click Submit when you're ready.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to TV. Make sure it's turned on and the IP is correct.
error.timeout: Pairing timed out. Make sure you accepted the pairing request on the TV.
